content.comment: Plan demonstrates good MECE structure with logical dependencies. Atomic tasks have clear deliverables. Minor improvement: some descriptions could be more specific.

_default.reasoning: Assessing plan quality: checking MECE (mutually exclusive, collectively exhaustive), dependency logic, task granularity, and clarity of descriptions. The decomposition covers the idea well with acyclic dependencies. Atomic tasks are appropriately scoped.
